description_long: This is a dark blue, single-propeller military airplane with distinctive white markings, including 'NAVY', a star insignia, and the number '416' on the nose and wings. The aircraft features a gull-wing design, with the wings set low on the fuselage and angled downward before curving upward. The tail section includes a vertical stabilizer with white markings and a horizontal stabilizer. The landing gear is extended and consists of two main wheels and a tail wheel, all visible beneath the fuselage and wings. The cockpit is located near the front of the fuselage, enclosed with a clear canopy, and appears to be a single-seat configuration. The surface of the airplane is glossy and shows some weathering or wear, giving it a realistic, operational appearance.
description: A dark blue, single-propeller military airplane with white 'NAVY' markings, gull wings, and an enclosed cockpit. The aircraft has visible landing gear and a glossy, weathered finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the 'NAVY' and star insignia, the gull-wing shape, and the tail markings.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the propeller, landing gear, and the distinctive gull-wing configuration.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with '416' nose number, cockpit canopy, and tail details visible.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the full wingspan, wing markings, and overall planform of the airplane.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, inverted gull-wing configuration with straight wings and no visible winglets; moderate dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Single piston engine with a front-mounted propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main fixed landing gear and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
